examples: She flashed him a false smile of congratulation.
We have received many letters of congratulation.
He immediately sent a message of congratulation to his fellow Jesuit Pope Francis on his election.
There will be considerable backslapping and mutual self-congratulation that they have prevented Depression 2.0.
